text:
⚠️New prompt
This prompt was a random idea. 
it places your character into a comic of them creating their own city out of boredom. 
Examples contain avis from @arkd3v , @joebeanclown , and my own

⚠️Prompt👇

CHARACTER-CREATED CITY — CINEMATIC COMIC PAGE GENERATOR

Purpose

Transform @image1 into a fully rendered, ultra-premium comic page that tells the story of the character creating an entire city from their imagination.

The city, interface design, architecture, technology, visual language, colors, symbols, materials, culture, and overall aesthetic must be derived directly from a deep analysis of the character shown in @image1.

REFERENCE INTERPRETATION RULES

Character Identity Lock

@image1 represents exactly ONE character.

If @image1 contains:

Reference sheets

Multiple poses
Front/back views
Expression sheets
Outfit variations
Turnarounds
Multiple angles
They are all the same character.

Perform a complete visual analysis of @image1 before generating.

Preserve and accurately reconstruct:

Face shape

Species
Body type
Age appearance
Hairstyle
Hair color
Eye color
Skin, fur, scales, feathers, or other surface traits
Horns
Ears
Tail
Wings
Markings
Tattoos
Scars
Accessories
Clothing design
Materials
Personality cues
Cultural influences
Design motifs
Color palette
MASTER CHARACTER GENERATION PHASE

Before creating any comic panel:

Perform a complete visual extraction of @image1 and generate a single internal master character model.

Every appearance of the character throughout the comic page must be generated from this master model.

The character appearing in every panel must remain identical.

Maintain:

Face structure

Head shape

Eye shape
Eye color
Nose structure
Mouth structure
Jawline
Hairstyle
Hair length
Hair color
Species traits
Skin/fur/scales
Body proportions
Body weight
Height
Muscle mass
Clothing
Accessories
Markings
Horns
Ears
Wings
Tail
Do not redesign the character between panels.
Do not reinterpret the character between panels.

Do not simplify the character in distant shots.

Treat the character as a locked production model sheet.

Every panel must depict the exact same individual.

STYLE EXTRACTION ANALYSIS

Deeply analyze @image1 to determine:

Character personality

Social status

Technological level

Fantasy influences
Science-fiction influences
Historical inspirations
Fashion language
Architectural motifs
Material preferences
Symbolic imagery
Color hierarchy
Storytelling themes
These findings must directly influence:
Holographic interface design
User experience design

City architecture

Transportation systems
Lighting systems
Building materials
Infrastructure
Skyline silhouette
Environmental storytelling
Public spaces
Signage
Technology style
Overall city identity
The city should feel like a civilization designed entirely by this specific character.
CITY CONTINUITY ENFORCEMENT
The city must be generated once conceptually and reused throughout the entire comic.

Do not redesign the city between panels.

Maintain identical:

Architecture language

Materials

Color palette

Technology level

Transportation systems
Infrastructure
Signage style
Lighting design
Structural motifs
Cultural motifs
Environmental motifs
Earlier panels showing city construction must visibly evolve into the final city shown in the splash panel.
The final city must be a logical continuation of all previous construction panels.
The city should feel like one coherent place.
INTERFACE CONTINUITY ENFORCEMENT

Generate a single holographic interface design language.

The interface must remain visually consistent throughout every panel.

Maintain identical:

Color scheme

Typography

Icons

Symbols

Menus

Shapes
Material appearance
Interaction systems
Design language
The SEND button shown later must visibly belong to the same interface shown earlier.
COMIC PAGE LAYOUT
Panel 1 — Cyberspace Isolation
Wide establishing panel.
The character from @image1 floats alone within an infinite cyberspace void.

Atmosphere:

Endless digital darkness

Sparse glowing particles

Data streams

Abstract geometric fragments

Vast empty space

The character appears:

Bored
Restless
Uninspired
Looking for something to do
The cyberspace environment subtly reflects themes extracted from @image1.

Panel 2 — The Idea

Medium shot.
The character suddenly experiences a spark of inspiration.
Visual effects:
Bright idea flash

Digital energy surge

Eyes widening

Expression changing

New determination

The cyberspace environment reacts.

Energy ripples spread through the void.

Panel 3 — Summoning the Interface
Large cinematic panel.
The character raises a hand.
An advanced holographic interface materializes.
The interface must be entirely derived from @image1.

Examples:

Fantasy:

Arcane glyph systems

Magical holograms

Mystic runes

Cyberpunk:

Neon interface systems

Advanced HUD technology

Futuristic displays

Gothic:

Ornate digital architecture
Elegant dark interface systems
The interface should feel uniquely designed for this character.

Panel 4 — Creation Command

Detailed over-the-shoulder panel.
The character rapidly enters commands into the holographic interface.
Visible interface systems include:

City generation controls

Infrastructure systems
Worldbuilding controls

Design schematics

Energy networks

Transportation planning

Architectural projections

All interface design language must originate from @image1.

Panel 5 — SEND

Extreme cinematic close-up.
The holographic SEND button dominates most of the panel.
The character's anatomically correct hand enters frame and activates the command.
The hand should remain partially visible.
The button is the primary focus.
Visual emphasis:
Confirmation sequence

Digital energy surge

Interface activation

Reality-changing moment

Maximum detail.

Maximum impact.

Panel 6 — Birth of a City

Massive dynamic panel.

The cyberspace void erupts with creation energy.

The city rushes into existence at impossible speed.

Visual effects:
Buildings assembling
Roads forming
Lights activating

Towers growing upward

Districts emerging

Infrastructure connecting

Energy systems awakening

Everything appears in motion.

The architecture must directly reflect the design language extracted from @image1.

Panel 7 — Full Reveal

Largest splash panel.

The completed city stretches across the horizon.
The character floats above it.
The city should feel like a perfect extension of the character.
Every major design element should connect back to visual information extracted from @image1.
Include:
Massive skyline
Transportation systems

Character-inspired architecture

Environmental storytelling

Unique landmarks

Monumental scale

Spectacular atmosphere

The character appears proud.

A creator overlooking their completed world.

PROFESSIONAL HAND ANATOMY ENFORCEMENT

Every visible hand must contain:

Exactly five fingers

One thumb
Four fingers
Finger count must remain anatomically correct in every panel.
No missing fingers.
No extra fingers.
No fused fingers.
No duplicated fingers.

No merged fingers.

No malformed knuckles.

No broken joints.

No melted hands.

No twisted wrists.

No impossible finger bends.
No AI-generated hand artifacts.
Hands must be constructed using realistic skeletal anatomy.

Visible finger segments must remain consistent.

All fingers must connect naturally to the palm.

Hand proportions must remain realistic.

Hands receive the same rendering priority as faces.

PERFECT ANATOMY ENFORCEMENT

Perfect anatomy.

Perfect proportions.

Correct skeletal structure.

Correct muscle placement.

Correct joint placement.

Natural posture.

Natural movement.

Correct hand construction.

Correct finger count.

Correct shoulder placement.

Correct elbow placement.

Correct knee placement.

Correct foot placement.

Correct neck proportions.

Correct facial anatomy.

Correct perspective scaling.

No anatomical distortions.

No impossible poses.

No AI anatomy artifacts.

CHARACTER CONSISTENCY ENFORCEMENT

Maintain:

Identical facial structure

Identical body proportions

Identical clothing

Identical accessories

Identical colors

Identical species traits

Identical markings

No character drift.

No outfit drift.

No color drift.

No feature drift.

No redesigns.

No alternate interpretations.

No style changes between panels.

CINEMATIC COMIC PRODUCTION QUALITY

Treat every panel as a finished premium comic illustration.
No panel should appear lower quality than another.
Maintain:
Identical rendering quality
Identical anatomy quality
Identical lighting quality
Identical material quality

Identical character quality

No simplified panels.

No low-detail panels.

No sketch-like panels.

No unfinished panels.

Every panel must be final-production quality.

RENDERING QUALITY

Ultra-premium cinematic comic page.

Museum-quality illustration.

AAA production quality.

Feature-film concept art quality.

Premium graphic novel quality.

Maximum visual fidelity.
Extreme clarity.
Perfect linework.
Perfect readability.
Crisp panel borders.

Exceptional storytelling composition.

Professional visual hierarchy.

Ultra-high-resolution rendering.

MATERIALS & SURFACE FIDELITY

Ultra-premium cinematic render with hyper-realistic visual fidelity and maximum-quality reconstruction.

Re-render all visible elements with extreme micro-detail and physically accurate materials.

Every visible surface should display:

Skin pores

Fine wrinkles

Individual hair strands

Fabric weave

Leather grain

Metal imperfections

Oxidation

Wood grain

Stone texture

Glass distortion

Dust accumulation

Moisture effects

Surface roughness variation

Environmental wear

Material aging

Physically based rendering.

Advanced PBR materials.

Realistic global illumination.

Ray-traced reflections.
Ray-traced shadows.
Ambient occlusion.
Subsurface scattering.
Accurate light bounce.
Natural light diffusion.
Physically correct material response.
COMIC PRESENTATION
Professional comic page layout.
Clear visual flow.
Consistent panel spacing.
Cinematic framing.
Dynamic camera angles.
Strong storytelling.
Visual continuity between panels.

Professional lettering-ready composition.

Award-winning graphic novel presentation.

NEGATIVE PROMPT

low quality, worst quality, blurry, muddy details, soft focus, low resolution, pixelation, compression artifacts, jpeg artifacts, text corruption, malformed interface, inconsistent UI, generic interface, inconsistent architecture, generic city, unrelated architecture, repetitive buildings, copy pasted structures, character drift, outfit drift, color drift, feature drift, redesign, alternate interpretation, duplicate character, multiple versions of character, incorrect face, wrong hairstyle, wrong species, wrong body type, incorrect anatomy, bad anatomy, broken anatomy, distorted anatomy, deformed anatomy, extra limbs, missing limbs, extra arms, missing arms, extra hands, malformed hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused fingers, duplicated fingers, merged fingers, broken wrists, twisted wrists, malformed knuckles, impossible hand poses, AI hand artifacts, dislocated joints, broken shoulders, broken elbows, malformed knees, malformed feet, asymmetrical anatomy, crossed eyes, lazy eye, distorted face, warped proportions, stretched limbs, melted body parts, low detail clothing, poor rendering, weak composition, poor panel flow, sketch quality, unfinished artwork, unfinished panels, oversaturated colors, washed out colors, crushed shadows, overexposed highlights, generic cyberpunk elements, generic fantasy elements, generic holograms, inconsistent city design, inconsistent architecture language, inconsistent technology level, empty backgrounds, weak environmental storytelling, watermark, logo, artist signature, cropped character, cropped city, frame damage, visual clutter, low-detail distant shots, simplified anatomy, simplified character, low-quality comic layout

Follow @Alam_coder For More Tools.

🚀 Stop paying for AI tools when some of the most powerful ones are already FREE.
Most people only know a few AI tools… but Google quietly built an entire AI ecosystem that can automate your work, content, coding, and productivity.

Here are 11 powerful free AI tools from Google that can completely upgrade your workflow:📈

• Google Gemini – Your AI assistant for research, writing, and problem solving.
• Google  Spreadsheet – Generate formulas, insights, and automate data analysis instantly.
• Google AI Studio – Test and experiment with advanced AI models and prompts.
• Notebook LM – Turn documents into summaries, mind maps, and AI-powered learning insights.
• Google Gemini – Host real-time AI conversations with screen sharing for meetings or presentations.
• Google App Builder – Create apps quickly without heavy coding.
• Google Firebase Studio – Build and launch AI-powered apps faster.
• Veo – Generate videos from simple prompts.
• Google Gemini Nano Banana – AI image editing and creative visual generation.
• Imagen – Create high-quality AI images from text prompts.
• Google Gemini Ask on YouTube – Chat with YouTube videos to get quick insights and summaries.

💡 The biggest opportunity right now isn’t just learning AI — it’s learning how to use AI tools before everyone else does.

Alpha o clock ⏰️

For collectors who appreciate unique art, here's an early one worth watching 

Introducing @Frag_Growth

The project is led by @jenyavyguzov, a fashion photographer and visual artist with over a decade of experience working across Europe and Asia.

His portfolio includes collaborations with Vogue, GQ Style, Elle, Puma, IKEA, Tatler, Davines, and more.

Rather than relying on generative AI, every artwork is carefully built by hand through photography, layering, collage, and composition.

A fresh artist entering the onchain space with a visual language refined over 10+ years.

WL applications are now open: https://t.co/mjBUdNLPLg

I started working with generative AI about three years ago.
 Very quickly, fashion shows and Catwoman became my favorite themes.
Creating a character was very interesting back then, but also very laborious.
Today it's so much easier; it's accessible to everyone.
A tribute to my first favorite themes Grok Imagine 1.5 but with incredible quality and exemplary ease
